req.title: Announcement rollout — variant 2
req.statement: A system-admin shall publish an org-wide announcement to employees in chosen departments; publishing without any department selection shall be rejected. Additionally, the action must be idempotent under retry.

doc.reasoning: R-WEB-088 mandates three distinct test concerns: (1) a happy-path publish with valid department selection (EP — valid partition), (2) a rejection when no departments are selected (NEG/DT — error pathway returning 422), (3) a boundary case exercising exactly one department selected (BVA — minimum valid cardinality), and (4) idempotency under retry (STC — state does not change on re-submission). Four tests are generated to cover all mandatory kinds plus the idempotency semantic. Each test is self-contained via fixtures that create and clean up their own data.

tests.name: test_publish_announcement_with_valid_departments
preconditions: At least two departments exist in the organisation
No duplicate announcement with the same title exists
actions: Fill in announcement title and body
Select two or more departments from the picker
expected: Announcement record appears in the announcement list
All employees in selected departments receive a notification
trace: R-WEB-088 — positive path: valid department selection accepted
R-WEB-088 — expected outcome: announcement created; target employees notified
tests.executable:
import pytest
from playwright.sync_api import expect

def test_publish_announcement_with_valid_departments(admin_page, announcement_cleanup, two_dept_ids):
    page = admin_page
    page.goto("/org-announcements/new")

    page.fill("[data-testid='announcement-title']", "All-Hands Q3")
    page.fill("[data-testid='announcement-body']", "Please join the Q3 all-hands.")

    for dept_id in two_dept_ids:
        page.check(f"[data-testid='dept-checkbox-{dept_id}']")

    with page.expect_response(lambda r: "/org-announcements" in r.url and r.request.method == "POST") as resp_info:
        page.click("[data-testid='publish-btn']")

    resp = resp_info.value
    assert resp.status in (200, 201), f"Expected 200/201, got {resp.status}"

    expect(page.locator("[data-testid='success-banner']")).to_be_visible()

    announcement_id = resp.json().get("id")
    announcement_cleanup(announcement_id)

    notifications = <get_notifications_for_departments>(two_dept_ids)
    assert len(notifications) > 0, "No notifications sent to target departments"

tests.name: test_publish_announcement_no_departments_returns_422
actions: Fill in announcement title and body
expected: Error message indicating department selection is required is displayed
trace: R-WEB-088 — error pathway: 422 when no departments selected
R-WEB-088 — publishing without any department selection shall be rejected
tests.executable:
import pytest
from playwright.sync_api import expect

def test_publish_announcement_no_departments_returns_422(admin_page):
    page = admin_page
    page.goto("/org-announcements/new")

    page.fill("[data-testid='announcement-title']", "No-Dept Announcement")
    page.fill("[data-testid='announcement-body']", "This should be rejected.")

    # Ensure all checkboxes are unchecked
    checkboxes = page.locator("[data-testid^='dept-checkbox-']")
    for i in range(checkboxes.count()):
        checkboxes.nth(i).uncheck()

    with page.expect_response(lambda r: "/org-announcements" in r.url and r.request.method == "POST") as resp_info:
        page.click("[data-testid='publish-btn']")

    resp = resp_info.value
    assert resp.status == 422, f"Expected 422, got {resp.status}"

    body = resp.json()
    assert "department" in str(body).lower(), "Error body missing department hint"

    expect(page.locator("[data-testid='error-banner']")).to_be_visible()
    expect(page.locator("[data-testid='success-banner']")).not_to_be_visible()

tests.name: test_publish_announcement_exactly_one_department
preconditions: At least one department exists in the organisation
No duplicate announcement with the same title exists
actions: Fill in announcement title and body
Select exactly one department (minimum valid boundary)
expected: Announcement is created and linked to the single selected department
Employees in that department receive a notification
trace: R-WEB-088 — BVA: exactly one department is the lower boundary of valid department count
R-WEB-088 — expected outcome: announcement created with minimum valid selection
tests.executable:
import pytest
from playwright.sync_api import expect

def test_publish_announcement_exactly_one_department(admin_page, announcement_cleanup, one_dept_id):
    page = admin_page
    page.goto("/org-announcements/new")

    page.fill("[data-testid='announcement-title']", "Single-Dept Announcement")
    page.fill("[data-testid='announcement-body']", "Targeted at one department.")

    page.check(f"[data-testid='dept-checkbox-{one_dept_id}']")

    with page.expect_response(lambda r: "/org-announcements" in r.url and r.request.method == "POST") as resp_info:
        page.click("[data-testid='publish-btn']")

    resp = resp_info.value
    assert resp.status in (200, 201), f"Expected 200/201, got {resp.status}"

    body = resp.json()
    assert body.get("department_ids") == [one_dept_id], "Announcement not linked to exactly one dept"

    announcement_cleanup(body.get("id"))

    notifications = <get_notifications_for_departments>([one_dept_id])
    assert len(notifications) > 0, "No notifications sent to the single target department"

tests.name: test_publish_announcement_idempotent_under_retry
preconditions: At least one department exists in the organisation
No announcement with the idempotency key used in this test exists
actions: POST announcement payload with Idempotency-Key header — first submission
POST identical payload with the same Idempotency-Key — second submission (retry)
Assert response status and body are equivalent to first response
expected: First POST returns HTTP 201 with a new announcement id
Second POST with same Idempotency-Key returns HTTP 200 or 201 with the same announcement id
Exactly one announcement record exists in the database after both calls
trace: R-WEB-088 — idempotency under retry: the action must be idempotent under retry
STC: system transitions to 'published' on first call; second call must not re-enter 'creating' state
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

def test_publish_announcement_idempotent_under_retry(admin_auth_headers, one_dept_id, announcement_cleanup):
    base_url = <get_base_url>()
    idempotency_key = "idem-test-r-web-088-retry"
    payload = {
        "title": "Idempotency Test Announcement",
        "body": "Should only be created once.",
        "department_ids": [one_dept_id]
    }
    headers = {**admin_auth_headers, "Idempotency-Key": idempotency_key}

    r1 = requests.post(f"{base_url}/org-announcements", json=payload, headers=headers)
    assert r1.status_code in (200, 201), f"First POST failed: {r1.status_code}"
    announcement_id_1 = r1.json()["id"]
    announcement_cleanup(announcement_id_1)

    r2 = requests.post(f"{base_url}/org-announcements", json=payload, headers=headers)
    assert r2.status_code in (200, 201), f"Retry POST failed: {r2.status_code}"
    announcement_id_2 = r2.json()["id"]

    assert announcement_id_1 == announcement_id_2, "Retry created a duplicate announcement"

    all_announcements = <fetch_announcements_by_idempotency_key>(idempotency_key)
    assert len(all_announcements) == 1, f"Expected 1 record, found {len(all_announcements)}"
